text:
Spirited Away Hollow (神隠しの洞) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. It contains a Hidden Hollow that transports anyone who enters it to a desolate place.

Summary

Spirited Away Hollow 神隠しの洞 - The Spirited Away Hollow acts as a tunnel for players who enter it to transport to a desolate location within the country. In using this hollow, the player has no need to spend any money on travel (and, in fact, resources). This hollow is good for playing hide and seek.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; width: 100%; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.005 - 神隠しの洞 
この洞に入って出てくると、どこか人気のない場所に移動している。ただし国内限定。どこへ飛ばされても、何故か金を使うことなく洞へ帰って来ることが出来る。
|-
![Eng]
|No.005 - Spirited Away Hollow 
When you come out of this hollow, you are in a place with no population. Somewhere in the country. It is possible to return through without needing to spend any money for some reason.
|}

Trivia

This may be a reference to one of Hayao Miyazaki's hit movies, "Spirited Away".
